---
title: "Data"
---

## LSWT

Lake Surface Water Temperature. In this exploration, values are from a reconstructed/corrected LSWT product rather than direct in-situ lake-temperature observations.

## GLAST

Global Lake Surface Temperature dataset.
Daily reconstructed LSWT for ~92,000 lakes globally, 1981–2020. GLAST combines station-temperature information with ERA5-Land-driven FLAKE simulations and correction; it is not a direct observational record. `raw` elsewhere in this site means un-smoothed GLAST product values.

## ERA5-Land

Reanalysis dataset from ECMWF.
Provides land surface variables (temperature, radiation, wind, evaporation, etc.)
at ~9 km resolution, hourly.
Useful as auxiliary climate drivers for lake temperature analysis.

## HydroLAKES

Global database of lake polygons and attributes
(area, depth, volume, shoreline length, etc.).
Used for lake morphometry and spatial classification.
